name: COAL INDIA LTD
rationale: Held, cheap, high-yield large-cap energy with rising revisions and positive momentum — keep core.

name: MUTHOOT FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Held NBFC with very strong rising revisions; gold-loan franchise benefiting from high gold prices — keep core.

name: HINDALCO  INDUSTRIES  LTD
rationale: Held metals name with rising revisions, positive momentum and fair value — keep as a core commodity holding.

name: OIL AND NATURAL GAS CORP.
rationale: Cheap large-cap energy with strong rising revisions and positive relative momentum — the cleanest value+revision pairing in the sheet.

name: NMDC LTD.
rationale: Large-cap miner, strongly rising revisions, positive momentum, reasonable valuation — adds to the commodity value tilt.

name: MEESHO LIMITED
rationale: Largest holding; structural e-commerce story but revisions only neutral — trim to right-size single-name risk.

name: LENSKART SOLUTIONS LTD
rationale: Held eyewear platform with very strong rising revisions and positive momentum — keep.

name: LIFE INSURA CORP OF INDIA
rationale: Large insurer, very strong rising revisions, cheap — a high-conviction financials add that diversifies away from banks.

name: SOLAR INDUSTRIES (I) LTD
rationale: Held defence/explosives compounder with strong rising revisions and positive momentum — keep core.

name: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO LTD
rationale: Aluminium producer with the strongest momentum in the metals cluster plus rising revisions.

name: ICICI BANK LTD.
rationale: Held best-in-class private bank; revisions only flat but franchise quality warrants a core weight.

name: GRASIM INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Quality mid/large diversified compounder with very strong rising revisions at a fair valuation.

name: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Held index heavyweight; revisions neutral but core large-cap ballast with retail/telecom optionality — keep.

name: ASIAN PAINTS LIMITED
rationale: Held quality franchise with strongly rising revisions despite weak recent momentum — a revision-led mean-reversion hold.

name: BHARTI AIRTEL LIMITED
rationale: Held telecom leader; ARPU-led structural cash compounding — core defensive growth despite soft momentum.

name: STATE BANK OF INDIA
rationale: Held PSU bank, cheap; revisions soft but valuation and franchise scale justify a core weight (it is our namesake-style PSU anchor).

name: BAJAJ FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Held best-in-class NBFC; revisions flat but franchise growth durable — keep core.

name: VARUN BEVERAGES LIMITED
rationale: Held beverages compounder with fair revisions and quality franchise — keep, lightly trimmed.

name: ZYDUS LIFESCIENCES LTD
rationale: Diversified pharma with strong rising revisions at a fair price — complements GLAND in healthcare.

name: GLAND PHARMA LIMITED
rationale: Injectables pharma with strong rising revisions, positive momentum, fair value — fresh quality healthcare add.

name: AVENUE SUPERMARTS LIMITED
rationale: Held value-retail compounder; revisions fair, quality franchise — keep as consumption ballast.

name: NTPC LTD
rationale: Held power utility; modest revisions, defensive yield — keep a reduced core weight.

name: INFOSYS LIMITED
rationale: Held large IT; revisions soft and momentum negative — de-size, prefer COFORGE for IT revision exposure.

name: TATA CONSULTANCY SERV LT
rationale: Held large IT; modestly positive revisions but weak momentum — keep a reduced core position.

name: JINDAL STEEL LIMITED
rationale: Held steel name; revisions/momentum only neutral — keep a smaller position, prefer NMDC/HINDALCO in metals.

name: HDFC BANK LTD
rationale: Held mega-cap bank but revisions are clearly soft and momentum weak — de-size while keeping franchise exposure.

name: KOTAK MAHINDRA BANK LTD
rationale: Held private bank; flat revisions and weak momentum — trim but retain quality franchise.

name: ITC LTD
rationale: Held FMCG; revisions and momentum both soft — de-size the cigarettes/FMCG ballast.

name: COFORGE LIMITED
rationale: Mid/large IT with very strong rising revisions despite soft price — a revision-led IT add as the franchise re-accelerates.

name: INDUSIND BANK LIMITED
rationale: Rising revisions and reasonable value in a beaten-down private bank — a small contrarian financials tactical add.

name: FSN E COMMERCE VENTURES
rationale: Consumer-internet name with strong rising revisions — small structural growth tilt.

name: VISHAL MEGA MART LIMITED
rationale: Held value-retail; modest signals — keep a small structural consumption position.

name: DLF LIMITED
rationale: Held realty; revisions/momentum soft after a strong cycle — trim but retain a realty toehold.

name: VEDANTA LIMITED
rationale: Strongest momentum in the metals cluster with positive revisions — small commodity-momentum tactical add.
